message:
test(policy_quarantine): add 36 property tests for quarantine/kill-switch module

Covers serde roundtrip for all 11 serializable types (QuarantineReason,
QuarantineSeverity, QuarantineState, ComponentKind, QuarantinedComponent,
KillSwitchLevel, KillSwitch, QuarantineAuditType, QuarantineAuditEvent,
QuarantineTelemetry, QuarantineTelemetrySnapshot) plus behavioral invariants
for severity ordering, expiry monotonicity, blocking semantics, kill switch
state machine, probation lifecycle, and registry telemetry counters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
